source: The space foundry will refine minerals into alloys. Having §GAssembly Line Manufacturing§! will improve the output by §Y1 Alloy§!  £alloys.\n
text: The space foundry will refine minerals into alloys. Having __PROT_0000__Assembly Line Manufacturing__PROT_0001__ will improve the output by __PROT_0002__1 Alloy__PROT_0003__  £alloys.__PROT_0004__

source: The space factory will refine minerals into consumer goods. Having §GAssembly Line Manufacturing§! will improve the output by §Y2 Consumer Goods§!  £consumer_goods.\n
text: The space factory will refine minerals into consumer goods. Having __PROT_0000__Assembly Line Manufacturing__PROT_0001__ will improve the output by __PROT_0002__2 Consumer Goods__PROT_0003__  £consumer_goods.__PROT_0004__

source: A secury branch office will focus on the defense of your trade routes against the local piracy.\n
text: A secury branch office will focus on the defense of your trade routes against the local piracy.__PROT_0000__

source: Assists in empire-level management tasks, increasing the administration ability of the empire.\n
text: Assists in empire-level management tasks, increasing the administration ability of the empire.__PROT_0000__

source: A special refinery that transforms minerals into rare crystals.\n
text: A special refinery that transforms minerals into rare crystals.__PROT_0000__
